name: call-simulator
description: AI customer service training simulator (Cloudflare Pages + Functions).

scripts.secret:password: wrangler pages secret put APP_PASSWORD --project-name call-simulator
scripts.secret:session: wrangler pages secret put SESSION_SECRET --project-name call-simulator
scripts.secret:anthropic: wrangler pages secret put ANTHROPIC_API_KEY --project-name call-simulator
scripts.secret:elevenlabs: wrangler pages secret put ELEVENLABS_API_KEY --project-name call-simulator
